name: 5'x7' Eyelash Shag Area Rug Oatmeal - Threshold™
description:
Spruce up your flooring with modern, functional elegance with this Eyelash Shag Area Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular area rug features an eyelash shag exterior in an oatmeal hue for a stylish look that blends seamlessly with just about any existing decor. The recycled polyester-polypropylene blend fabric provides soft underfoot comfort, and the latex-blend backing helps keep it in place. Easy to clean, this high-pile rug is ideal for use in a variety of indoor spaces.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
